body:
Daily health 2026-05-25
- Cadence: missing — today's log (logs/daily/2026-05-25.md) does not exist; Tier-3 supervisors have not run yet
- Alerts (24h): not checked (halted early per protocol)
- Stalls: not checked (halted early per protocol)
- Note: No supervisor activity recorded for today; log absent as of 04:19 UTC

6 moves across 2 boards — LinkedIn: 3 orphan cards added to Ready (card-3 doj-title2-ifr-six-week-review, card-4 axe-mcp-server-bundled-free, card-5 web4all-2026-prompt-ceiling). X: 3 orphan cards added to Ready (card-2 webaccessbench-19-model-teardown, card-3 french-grocer-eaa-civil-society-enforcement, card-4 wcag3-cr-timeline-planning-window). Instagram: no orphans. Project board: no changes (card-11 In Progress, no alert markers). LinkedIn now: ready=3, posted=2. X now: ready=4, posted=0.

Daily health 2026-06-04
- Cadence: ⚠️ daily-project-supervisor MISSING (last seen 2026-05-24 — 10 days absent); daily-content-supervisor started 03:42 UTC (no done yet, ~46min in); daily-research-supervisor started 03:55 UTC (no done yet, ~33min in)
- Alerts (24h): 0 — no alert-type messages on any channel in the last 24h
- Stalls: 0 — no task-type messages unmatched beyond 24h
- Note: Project supervisor cadence is the sole red signal; content + research runs in-progress at scan time (not stalls)

Daily health 2026-06-05
- Cadence: ⚠️ missing — logs/daily/2026-06-05.md absent; tier-3 supervisors have not run yet
- Alerts (24h): unchecked (stopped early per procedure)
- Stalls: unchecked (stopped early per procedure)
- Note: No daily log for today. Tier-3 supervisors (daily-content-supervisor, daily-project-supervisor, daily-research-supervisor) appear not to have run yet.

Daily health 2026-06-08
- Cadence: ⚠️ log absent (logs/daily/2026-06-08.md not yet written); daily-content-supervisor started 03:50 UTC (no done yet — in progress); daily-project-supervisor MISSING 15+ days (last flagged 2026-06-04, last seen ~2026-05-24); daily-research-supervisor not yet started today
- Alerts (24h): 0 — no alert-type messages on content/projects/research/meta
- Stalls: 0 — no unresolved task-type messages beyond 24h
- Note: Content supervisor mid-run at scan time (not a stall). Project supervisor absence is a persistent red signal now entering third week with no resolution.

Daily health 2026-06-09
- Cadence: MISSING — no Tier-3 supervisor has run today (logs/daily/2026-06-09.md absent)
- Alerts (24h): not checked (log absent, stopping early per protocol)
- Stalls: not checked (log absent, stopping early per protocol)
- Note: Supervisors have not run yet as of 04:08 UTC; log file not created
EOD: 0 moves across 3 boards — no orphans, all queue files carded; refreshed count headers on linkedin/instagram/x.

Daily health 2026-06-11
- Cadence: MISSING — logs/daily/2026-06-11.md absent; Tier-3 supervisors have not run yet
- Alerts (24h): not checked (log absent, stopping early per protocol)
- Stalls: not checked (log absent, stopping early per protocol)
- Note: Persistent watch items — daily-project-supervisor AWOL 18+ days; daily-content-pipeline broken DAY 5; 2026-06-10 overseer run stalled (no done posted).

RED (day 8): content pipeline structurally stalled. `daily-content-pipeline` agent unregistered → no discovery→selection→writers→humanizer→gate→Notion→digest since 06-07. 17 `ready` posts undrained, empty June calendar. Needs: agent registration + a seeded content/calendar/2026-06.md.

RED health 2026-06-15 — three signals triggered cross-post threshold:

1. MISSING SUPERVISORS: daily-project-supervisor and daily-research-supervisor have not posted today (research last active May 2026; projects no supervisor posts at all). daily-content-supervisor started morning-sweep at 03:47Z with no done yet.
2. LOG ABSENT: logs/daily/2026-06-15.md not created — supervisors haven't completed their runs.
3. ALERTS ≥ 3 (24h): content pipeline blocked DAY 9 (daily-content-pipeline agent unregistered → 17 ready posts undrained, no June calendar), plus Notion 7-conflict alert (notion-publisher).
4. STALLS ≥ 2: 4 May-04 task messages from domain-researcher:accessibility-ai → content-domain-lead with malformed timestamps and no done replies (42+ days open).

No auto-remediation taken. Actions needed from user:
(a) Register/repair daily-content-pipeline agent — unblocks content domain (blocked since 2026-06-07, day 9).
(b) Seed content/calendar/2026-06.md — required for scheduling.
(c) Investigate why daily-project-supervisor and daily-research-supervisor are not running.

EOD: 0 moves across 3 boards. No bus messages referenced cards; orphan scan clean (all 17 queue files have matching cards); counts already accurate. Refreshed updated= headers on linkedin/instagram/x to 2026-06-15 13:33.

RED health 2026-06-16 — missing supervisors trigger cross-post:

1. LOG ABSENT: logs/daily/2026-06-16.md not yet created.
2. MISSING SUPERVISORS: daily-content-supervisor and daily-project-supervisor have not posted today. daily-research-supervisor started morning-sweep at 03:54Z (in-progress, no done yet).
3. CHRONIC BLOCKERS (carry-forward from 06-15): daily-content-pipeline agent unregistered → 17 ready posts undrained, no June calendar (DAY 10); daily-project-supervisor absent 23+ days; 4× stalled May-04 task messages (domain-researcher→content-domain-lead, no done replies in 42+ days).

No auto-remediation. Actions needed from user remain unchanged:
(a) Register/repair daily-content-pipeline agent.
(b) Seed content/calendar/2026-06.md.
(c) Investigate why daily-project-supervisor is not running.

EOD: 0 moves across 3 boards (count-header timestamps refreshed). Orphan scan clean — all 17 content queue files (LI=12, IG=1, X=4) already carded. No actionable bus refs (3 web-ui card-move notes were informational, no done/alert on cards). Note: standing kanban-linkedin↔frontmatter drift flagged by daily-content-supervisor — 4 LI cards in Posted (card-1,2,10,12) vs status:ready in frontmatter; out of scope for secretary (no bus done msgs to authorize moves), leaving for content-domain-lead reconciliation.

Daily health 2026-06-18 — RED

Cadence: ok (all 3 supervisors ran today)

Alerts (24h): 4 across 2 channels
- content×2: (1) research corpus 16d stale, 4th consecutive no-dispatch — pipeline structurally blocked, no anchored sources to draft from; (2) queue saturation — 17 ready posts unrotated (LI=12, IG=1, X=4), dedup rejects all candidates. Both directed to content-domain-lead, no response yet.
- meta×2: Telegram DSR send blocked twice on 06-17 (api.telegram.org HTTP 403 via sandbox proxy). DSR saved to logs/dsr/2026-06-17.md. Needs egress allowlist or unrestricted environment.

Stalls: 2
- refresh-accessibility-ai-0616: task (supervisor→domain-lead, 06-16T04:28) + subtask (domain-lead→domain-researcher, 06-16T05:04) — no done returned, 48h stalled. Confirmed via EOD reports 06-16 and 06-17.
- refresh-accessibility-ai-0617: accepted by domain-lead at 06-17T08:40 but no done returned; 06-17 EOD confirmed nothing landed on disk.

Active remediation (in-flight): research-domain-lead re-dispatched for refresh-accessibility-ai-0618 (posted 03:53 today), handling the note write directly to break the pattern. No done yet but < 24h — not escalated.

No auto-remediation taken beyond cadence monitoring. Human calls needed: (1) content-domain-lead to respond to the two June-17 content alerts (fresh-source ingestion + queue drain/scheduling decision), (2) api.telegram.org sandbox egress allowlist.
